# Carbon fixation in Calvin Cycle

## Short Teaching Summary
Carbon fixation in Calvin Cycle: Carbon fixation is the first step of the Calvin Cycle where the enzyme RuBisCO attaches one molecule of CO₂ to a five-carbon sugar called RuBP. Map connection: this idea links by example_of to nearby concepts. Pause point: say the main idea in one short phrase before moving on.
